name: Japanese Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons Fresh ginger root, grated (do not use powdered ginger)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each chicken wing into 3 parts, separating at the joints.
2. Freeze wing tips for another use.
3. In a 12 x 8 inch baking dish, mix remaining ingredients.
4. Add chicken wings and turn to coat well.
5. Let marinate for 1 hour, turning occasionally.
6. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
7. Bake chicken in marinade uncovered for 1 1/2 hours, turning occasionally.
8. Serve warm or
